title: cheilanthes nudiuscula
intro: Cheilanthes nudiuscula, also known as the slender lip fern or nudus fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes nudiuscula include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cheilanthes nudiuscula can be prepared as a tea or decoction by infusing the dried fronds in hot water, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
